body:
The person feels stuck in a loop

[Dialogue] You: You said it again
Them: Because it was not heard
You: But now it has been said three times
Them: And still you do not feel it

[Integration] One clear example is enough
source321FullText:
BELIEF: The chapter is too repetitive
THIRD PERSON: The person feels stuck in a loop
SECOND PERSON: You: You said it again
Them: Because it was not heard
You: But now it has been said three times
Them: And still you do not feel it
FIRST PERSON: One clear example is enough
